meta.title: Insurance network question — Delta disambiguation
meta.description: Caller unsure whether employer Delta is accepted — classify only, never promise coverage.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Cascade Family Dentistry, this is Aly.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, my name is Tom Reed. I'm confused about whether you accept Delta Dental through my employer.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Happy to help clarify. What's the best number to reach you?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I don't understand the difference between PPO and the state plan.
